rule_schema.standard_reference: Exact section or rule reference in standards/constitution.md.
rule_schema.section: Human section name from the standard.
rule_schema.title: Short operational title.
rule_schema.requirement: Normative requirement extracted from the standard.
rule_schema.applies_to: Repo surfaces where the rule applies.
rule_schema.trigger_kinds: Change categories that should pull this rule into an applicable checklist.
rule_schema.phases: Workflow phases where this rule is relevant.
rule_schema.enforcement_mode: validator-required, checklist-required, checklist-and-validator, advisory, or backlog.
rule_schema.evidence_required: What an implementation or verification receipt should record when applicable.
rule_schema.automation: Current or intended mechanical enforcement owner.

rules.title: Prefer free-tier infrastructure first
rules.requirement: Prefer no-cost or free-tier infrastructure until product proof or a recorded production need justifies expansion.
evidence_required: Paid or non-free infrastructure choices record the product proof or production need.
The active plan identifies the simpler free-tier option considered or rejected.

rules.title: Build vertical modules before framework abstraction
rules.requirement: Build applications as explicit vertical modules with clear public boundaries before adding framework-level abstraction.
evidence_required: New app functionality is organized around vertical modules with public boundaries.
New abstractions are justified by real cross-module or cross-app reuse.

rules.title: Require evidence before completion
rules.requirement: Do not mark work complete until the required spec artifacts, workflow receipts, and verification evidence exist.
evidence_required: Required spec artifacts exist for the slice.
workflow-receipts.md records required evidence.
Verification evidence is present or explicitly reported as blocked.

rules.title: Match security and compliance review to risk
rules.requirement: Gated work requires explicit checklist, migration, permission, and rollback review matched to the actual surface touched.
evidence_required: Gated work includes the required checklist and risk classification.
Migration, permission, and rollback review are recorded when those surfaces are touched.

rules.title: Keep generated apps in the same repo by default
rules.requirement: Generated apps under projects/ remain tracked by the root repository unless a later recorded decision splits them.
evidence_required: Generated apps are placed under projects/ in the root repository.
Any repo split decision is recorded before the split and references the governing workspace rule.

rules.title: Record deviations from simpler defaults
rules.requirement: When the simpler default is not used, document the deviation, why it is needed, and what simpler option was rejected.
evidence_required: The active plan or receipt documents any deviation from the simpler default.
The record includes why the deviation is needed and what simpler option was rejected.

rules.title: Delegate workflow mechanics to the workflow standard
rules.requirement: Workflow mechanics are delegated to standards/spec-driven-workflow.md.
evidence_required: Workflow mechanics changes are made in standards/spec-driven-workflow.md or the delegated command files.
The constitution remains a delegation surface rather than a duplicate procedure owner.

rules.title: Delegate workspace model to the workspace standard
rules.requirement: Workspace and repository model are delegated to standards/workspace.md.
evidence_required: Workspace and repository model changes are made in standards/workspace.md.
Constitution updates do not duplicate the workspace standard's detailed layout or exception rules.

rules.title: Delegate stack defaults to the stack standard
rules.requirement: Stack and dependency defaults are delegated to standards/stack.md.
evidence_required: Stack and dependency default changes are made in standards/stack.md.
Constitution updates do not duplicate detailed stack policy.

rules.title: Delegate testing to the testing standard
rules.requirement: Testing and rendered verification are delegated to standards/testing.md.
evidence_required: Testing and rendered verification changes are made in standards/testing.md.
Constitution updates do not duplicate detailed verification checklists.

rules.title: Delegate Codex routing to the capabilities standard
rules.requirement: Codex routing and optional accelerators are delegated to standards/codex-capabilities.md.
evidence_required: Codex routing or optional accelerator changes are made in standards/codex-capabilities.md.
Constitution updates keep the routing pointer rather than duplicating tool guidance.
